_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to remediate indicators of compromise.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documenting the rationale, rejected alternatives, and conditions that would trigger re-evaluation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.426), AB-A-003 (AB, cosine: 0.393).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.557). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [compromise, indicators, remediate] vs WIDAI-only terms [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.901, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to remediate indicators of compromise." and "Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documentin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.459 < STS 0.557 (gap -0.098). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [compromise, indicators, remediate] and [alternatives, architectural, conditions] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [compromise, indicators, remediate]. WIDAI-only: [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting].
